claims.claim: Success metric: 95% of UI requests resolved in <=2 communication rounds.
claims.re_read: Read pinscope/SPEC.md §1 'Success metric'. AC-107 (tests/unit/roundtrip.test.ts, tagged AC-107) asserts one scripted scenario resolves in <=2 rounds; examples/roundtrip/scenario.ts present. The 95%-of-population statistical rate is not measured by any harness.

claims.claim: Runtime module is organised into 6 layers: Inspection, Measurement, Control, State, Operation (plus root).
claims.re_read: Read §3 architecture diagram; layer grouping is descriptive context, individual components have their own ACs.

claims.claim: Dev build bundle budget: < 80 KB minified, < 25 KB gzipped.
claims.re_read: Read pinscope/package.json size-limit block: one 'runtime (dev)' entry, limit '80 KB'. AC-073 verify is `npm run size` exit 0.

claims.claim: Prod build budget: exactly 0 bytes of PinScope.
claims.re_read: ac-matrix.json AC-010/AC-074 are build-grep over pinscope/examples/vite-react/dist, expect_count 0 for /data-pin|PinScope|pinscope/.

claims.claim: State is React hooks only — no Redux/Zustand.
claims.re_read: grep -rn 'redux|zustand' pinscope/src pinscope/package.json -> no matches; runtime uses useState/useRef/useEffect only.

claims.claim: pinscope() returns a Vite plugin with name 'vite-plugin-pinscope' and enforce 'pre'.
claims.re_read: Read src/plugin/index.ts: returns { name: 'vite-plugin-pinscope', enforce: 'pre', ... }.

claims.claim: PinScopeOptions defaults: enabled=NODE_ENV!=='production', filePattern=/\.(jsx|tsx)$/, excludePattern=/node_modules|\.test\./, pinMapPath='.pinmap.json', stripInProduction=true, excludeTags=['Fragment','Suspense'].
claims.re_read: Read src/plugin/index.ts resolveOptions(): defaults match the §6.1 interface comment. No AC asserts the default values — AC-001 checks plugin shape, AC-013 checks filePattern/excludePattern behaviour, AC-003 fixes excludeTags content.

claims.claim: Plugin buildStart calls pinMap.load(); buildEnd calls pinMap.save().
claims.re_read: grep -n 'buildStart|buildEnd|pinMap.' src/plugin/index.ts -> buildStart()->pinMap.load(); buildEnd()->pinMap.reconcile()+pinMap.save(). No AC directly drives the Vite lifecycle hooks.

claims.claim: AST transformer parses with @babel/parser plugins jsx, typescript, decorators-legacy.
claims.re_read: grep -n 'jsx|typescript|decorators' src/plugin/ast-transformer.ts -> plugins:['jsx','typescript','decorators-legacy']. No AC asserts the parser plugin set.

claims.claim: Only JSXOpeningElements with a source loc receive a data-pin; elements lacking loc are skipped.
claims.re_read: grep -n 'loc' src/plugin/ast-transformer.ts -> `const loc = node.loc?.start; if (!loc) return;`. AC-002/004/005 cover injection/skip/stability but none asserts the loc-absent skip path.

claims.claim: transformJSX emits both transformed code AND a source map.
claims.re_read: ac-matrix.json AC-011 vitest-tag asserts result.map defined; src/plugin/ast-transformer.ts generates with sourceMaps and returns { code, map }.

claims.claim: PinMap.save() is dirty-gated — no write occurs when nothing changed.
claims.re_read: Read src/plugin/pin-map.ts save(): `if (!this.dirty) return;`. No AC asserts the dirty-gate; AC-006 validates the on-disk schema only.

claims.claim: getOrAssign refreshes last_seen and clears the deleted flag when an existing key is re-seen.
claims.re_read: Read src/plugin/pin-map.ts getOrAssign(): on existing entry sets last_seen=now and deletes the deleted flag. AC-008 covers reconcile setting deleted:true but no AC covers the un-delete / last_seen refresh on re-sight.

claims.claim: A removed element's PinMap entry is marked deleted:true and its ID is never reused.
claims.re_read: Read src/plugin/pin-map.ts reconcile()+getOrAssign(): reconcile sets deleted:true; getOrAssign allocates only via next_id++ for new keys.

claims.claim: A moved element produces a new file:line:column key and therefore a new ID.
claims.re_read: Read src/plugin/stable-id-generator.ts stableKey(): key=`${filePath}:${line}:${column}`; a moved element changes line/column -> new key -> new id. No AC exercises a moved element.

claims.claim: <PinScope/> portal-renders the HUD tree containing PinBadges, Rulers, Crosshair, GridOverlay, InfoPanel, TopBar, and CommandBar into document.body.
claims.re_read: Round-16 re-read of src/runtime/PinScope.tsx (full file): PinScopeHud's visible-branch createPortal renders <div data-pinscope-ui="root"> containing all 7 §7.1 components — <PinBadges/>, <Rulers/>, <Crosshair/>, <GridOverlay/>, <InfoPanel/>, <TopBar/>, <CommandBar/> (lines 92-103). R15 finding NF-15-01 is remediated and independently verified. AC-022 still only asserts the portal wrapper exists, so the claim remains uncovered though now satisfied.

claims.claim: <PinScope/> accepts props hudPosition, defaultGridMode, and shortcutsEnabled.
claims.re_read: Round-16 re-read of src/runtime/PinScope.tsx PinScopeProps (lines 19-28): declares enabled, hudPosition, defaultGridMode, and shortcutsEnabled; PinScope() forwards all three with defaults (lines 39-45) and PinScopeHud honours them — defaultGridMode seeds gridMode state, shortcutsEnabled gates useKeyboardShortcuts. R15 finding NF-15-02 is remediated and independently verified. No AC asserts the prop surface, so still uncovered.

claims.claim: When the HUD is hidden, <PinScope/> renders only a FloatingToggle.
claims.re_read: Round-16 re-read: src/runtime/components/FloatingToggle.tsx exists (exports FloatingToggle, data-pinscope-toggle button); PinScope.tsx PinScopeHud has a `if (!hudVisible)` branch (lines 83-90) whose portal renders only <FloatingToggle onShow=…/>. R15 finding NF-15-03 is remediated and independently verified. No AC asserts the HUD-hidden branch, so still uncovered.

claims.claim: Pin badges use z-index in the range 2147483645-2147483647 (blue default, red hover, green selected).
claims.re_read: Read src/runtime/styles/badges.css.ts: ::before z-index 2147483645, :hover::before 2147483646, [data-pin-selected]::before 2147483647; backgrounds rgba blue/red/green. AC-023 verifies only badge ::before text==pin id, not z-index or color states.

claims.claim: Void elements get a JS-overlay badge and a MutationObserver detects new void elements at runtime.
claims.re_read: Read src/runtime/components/VoidBadges.tsx (VOID_TAGS overlay div per void [data-pin]); src/runtime/managers/RuntimePinObserver.ts present for runtime e_r{N} IDs.

claims.claim: useHoveredElement throttles mousemove through requestAnimationFrame (one resolve per frame).
claims.re_read: grep -n 'requestAnimationFrame|raf' src/runtime/hooks/useHoveredElement.ts -> rafRef guard `if (rafRef.current !== null) return;` then resolve inside requestAnimationFrame; cancelAnimationFrame on cleanup. AC-026/027 assert nearest-ancestor / HUD-skip only.

claims.claim: InfoPanel is positioned position:fixed; right:16px; top:56px; width:320px.
claims.re_read: Read src/runtime/components/InfoPanel.tsx style: position:'fixed', top:56, width:320, right:16 when position==='right'. No AC asserts panel geometry.

claims.claim: InfoPanel empty values render '—', not '0px'.
claims.re_read: Read src/runtime/components/InfoPanel.tsx: isEmptyValue() treats '', 'none', 'normal', '0px' as empty -> StyleRow renders the em-dash.

claims.claim: Rulers are 24px wide/tall with ticks at 10/50/100/200 px and the corner shows live mouse coords.
claims.re_read: Round-16 re-read of src/runtime/components/Rulers.tsx (full file): BAR_X/BAR_Y are 24px; MINOR_SCALES=[10,50] drawn as repeating-gradient stripes, MAJOR_SCALES=[100,200] as labelled tick nodes, root carries data-ruler-scales="10,50,100,200"; a data-pinscope-ruler-corner element renders data-ruler-coord x/y from a mousemove listener. The §8.2 multi-scale tick set + corner live-coords are now implemented. AC-034 still verifies only 100px-interval ticks, so the claim stays covered-but-under-checked (a strengthen proposal, not a blocking gap).

claims.claim: Crosshair is disabled over the HUD, in measurement mode, or when the HUD is hidden.
claims.re_read: Round-16 re-read of src/runtime/components/Crosshair.tsx: props `measuring` and `hudHidden`; `if (measuring || hudHidden) return null;` and the mousemove handler hides the lines when `target.closest('[data-pinscope-ui]')`. PinScope.tsx passes <Crosshair measuring={measuring} hudHidden={!hudVisible}/>. The full §8.3 disable set (over-HUD + measurement-mode + HUD-hidden) is now implemented. AC-035 still verifies only the over-HUD hide, so the claim stays covered-but-under-checked (a strengthen proposal).

claims.claim: GridOverlay supports 4 modes (pixel 8px, baseline 4px, column 12-col, spacing-scale) cycling off->pixel->baseline->column->spacing->off, implemented via SVG <pattern>.
claims.re_read: grep -n 'ORDER|pixel|baseline|column|spacing|pattern' src/runtime/components/GridOverlay.tsx -> ORDER=[off,pixel,baseline,column,spacing], nextGridMode cycles modulo; CELL pixel=8 baseline=4 column=96 spacing=8; rendered via <pattern>.

claims.claim: TopBar is fixed; top:0; height:32px and shows viewport, grid mode, state override, and live pin count.
claims.re_read: Read src/runtime/components/TopBar.tsx: style top:0,height:32; data-field viewport/grid/state/pins; pin count = querySelectorAll('[data-pin]').length.

claims.claim: CommandBar is fixed; bottom:0; height:40px and expands to 120px on focus.
claims.re_read: Round-16 re-read of src/runtime/components/CommandBar.tsx: style.position='fixed', bottom:0, `height: focused ? 120 : 40` (line 150); a `focused` state is set true onFocus / false onBlur. R15 finding NF-15-04 is remediated and independently verified. AC-038 covers focus/history/blur keys only, not the expand height, so still uncovered.

claims.claim: CommandBar history is persisted to .pinscope/history.json, last 1000 entries.
claims.re_read: Read src/runtime/components/CommandBar.tsx: on Enter it calls history.append(entry) then persistHistory(history.list()), which POSTs {version,entries} to the dev-server route '/__pinscope/history'; the plugin (src/plugin/index.ts configureServer, HISTORY_ROUTE) writes .pinscope/history.json. HistoryManager caps the store at 1000. AC-053 checks the clipboard+history append path, not the .pinscope/history.json persistence cap — covered but under-checked.

claims.claim: CommandBar provides Tab autocomplete for pins/properties/values.
claims.re_read: Round-16 re-read of src/runtime/components/CommandBar.tsx onInputKey: an `e.key === 'Tab'` branch (lines 96-110) calls getSuggestions(value, readPins(), SHORTCUT_PROPERTIES)[0] and applies the completion (after a '.' completes the property fragment, otherwise the last pin token). autocomplete.ts is imported. R15 finding NF-15-05 is remediated and independently verified. AC-054 measures autocomplete latency but no AC asserts Tab is wired into CommandBar, so still uncovered.

claims.claim: MeasurementTool renders Δx/Δy/diagonal/gap labels and Alt-hover shows all sibling distances.
claims.re_read: Round-16 re-read of src/runtime/components/MeasurementTool.tsx (66 lines, full file): renders data-measure dx/dy/diagonal/gap (AC-039 covered). grep -ni 'alt|sibling' src/runtime/components/MeasurementTool.tsx -> no matches; no altKey handler and no sibling-distance rendering. The Alt-hover sibling-distances sub-behaviour is still absent. NOTE: this claim is covered_by AC-039, so it is NOT a blocking finding — it is a covered-but-under-checked claim handled by the AC-039 strengthen proposal.

claims.claim: StatePanel auto-generates override rules by scanning host stylesheets for :hover/:focus/:active.
claims.re_read: Round-16 re-read of src/runtime/components/StatePanel.tsx (full file): generateOverrideRules() iterates Array.from(document.styleSheets), reads sheet.cssRules (guarded against cross-origin SecurityError), filters CSSStyleRule whose selectorText includes the forced pseudo-class, strips it and re-scopes under [data-state-override="<state>"]; applyStateOverride() injects the synthesized rules into a dedicated <style data-pinscope-state-rules>. R15 finding NF-15-06 is remediated and independently verified. AC-040 asserts the [data-state-override] attribute path only, so still uncovered.

claims.claim: SnapshotManager.createSnapshot extracts exactly 32 computed-style properties per element.
claims.re_read: Read src/runtime/managers/SnapshotManager.ts TRACKED_STYLES — exactly 32 entries (counted). AC-042 validates the snapshot file against the §9.2 schema, which does not pin the count to 32 — covered but under-checked.

claims.claim: .pinmap.json conforms to the schema: version:1, numeric next_id, entries map of {id,tag,created,last_seen,deleted?}.
claims.re_read: Read src/types/pin-map.ts + pin-map.ts: data shape { version:1, next_id, entries } with entry {id,tag,created,last_seen,deleted?}.

claims.claim: An Operation conforms to the §9.3 schema with request_type one of 'operation'|'annotation'|'diagnostic'.
claims.re_read: grep -n 'request_type' src/runtime/parsers/operation-builder.ts -> base request_type:'operation', set to 'diagnostic' for query kind; src/types/operation.ts declares the union. ('annotation' reachable via the annotation flow.)

claims.claim: Snapshot creation persists via the dev-server endpoint /__pinscope/snapshot.
claims.re_read: Round-16 re-read: src/runtime/managers/EndpointSnapshotStore.ts is a SnapshotStore whose write() POSTs the snapshot to SNAPSHOT_ENDPOINT='/__pinscope/snapshot'; src/plugin/index.ts configureServer (SNAPSHOT_ROUTE='/__pinscope/snapshot') reads the body and writes .pinscope/snapshots/s_<id>.json. R15 finding NF-15-07 is remediated and independently verified. AC-042 verifies a snapshot file via a test store, not the dev-server endpoint of flow D, so still uncovered.

claims.claim: Hover inspection completes within a < 8 ms/frame budget.
claims.re_read: ac-matrix.json AC-071 vitest-tag; tests/unit/runtime/perf.test.tsx asserts the rAF callback duration < 8 ms.

claims.claim: Operation grammar supports Target.Property Operator Value, Target Operator Class, select Target, measure Target to Target, snapshot [Name], ? [Topic].
claims.re_read: Read src/runtime/parsers/operation-parser.ts: parseCommand handles operation/class/select/measure/snapshot/query forms; OPERATORS map covers set/increment/decrement; class regex covers += / -=.

claims.claim: Shortcut properties padding-y/x, margin-y/x, bg, fg, radius, weight, size, shadow resolve to CSS equivalents.
claims.re_read: Read src/runtime/parsers/property-shortcuts.ts SHORTCUTS map — all 10 shortcuts present and mapped.

claims.claim: PinScope reserves z-index 2147483647 and PinScope styles use !important against hostile CSS.
claims.re_read: Round-16 re-read of src/runtime/styles/badges.css.ts (full file): Z_SELECTED=2147483647 reserved; the badge ::before rules now carry !important on content/position/top/left/background/padding/border-radius/pointer-events/z-index, the :hover::before and [data-pin-selected]::before background+z-index carry !important, and the :hover / selected outlines carry !important. R15 finding NF-15-08 is remediated and independently verified. No AC covers the !important hardening, so still uncovered.

claims.claim: With > 500 pinned elements mousemove throttles to 30fps and badges < 16x16px are skipped.
claims.re_read: Read src/runtime/utils/throttle.ts (exists); AC-065 tagged in tests/unit/edge-utils.test.ts. grep '500|16' src/runtime/components/PinBadges.tsx src/runtime/components/VoidBadges.tsx -> no matches; the degrade behaviour is exercised by the AC-065 fixture test, not wired into a badge component — covered by AC-065, component-level wiring unconfirmed.

claims.claim: Initial <PinScope/> mount budget < 50 ms.
claims.re_read: ac-matrix.json AC-070 vitest-tag; tests/unit/runtime/perf.test.tsx asserts mount < 50 ms.

claims.claim: Operation parse budget < 4 ms.
claims.re_read: tests/unit/operation-perf.test.ts (AC-072 vitest-tag) — parse benchmark asserted < 4 ms.

claims.claim: The AST transformer unit suite has >= 50 input/output pairs.
claims.re_read: tests/unit/fixtures/transformer-cases.ts present; AC-080 (vitest-tag) requires the transformer suite >= 50 input/output pairs.

claims.claim: The operation-parser unit suite has >= 30 grammar variants.
claims.re_read: tests/unit/operation-parser.test.ts present; AC-081 (vitest-tag) requires >= 30 cases.

claims.claim: package.json exposes export subpaths pinscope/vite, pinscope/runtime, pinscope/next, pinscope/webpack.
claims.re_read: ac-matrix.json AC-090 vitest-tag; package.json exports include '.', './vite', './runtime', './next', './webpack'.

claims.claim: src/index.ts re-exports pinscope, withPinScope, PinScope, useDevState and the four public types.
claims.re_read: Round-16 re-read of src/index.ts (full file): re-exports pinscope, withPinScope (line 6, `export { withPinScope } from './plugin/next.js'`), PinScope, useDevState, and types PinScopeOptions/Operation/Snapshot/ElementSnapshot. R15 finding NF-15-09 is remediated and independently verified. AC-091's description lists only pinscope/PinScope/useDevState + four types — removing withPinScope from index.ts does NOT fail AC-091's check, so the claim is satisfied but still uncovered.

claims.claim: P5 (APEX Integration) is a defined phase with DoD deferred to §17.
claims.re_read: Read §16 phase table — descriptive phase plan; the concrete P5 behaviours are claimed in §17 and carry their own ACs.

claims.claim: framework/apex-skills/pinscope.md teaches the Pin/Operation/Snapshot model in apex-skill format.
claims.re_read: ac-matrix.json AC-100 greps the five apex-skill headings in framework/apex-skills/pinscope.md, min_count 5; file present.

claims.claim: /apex:ui-phase scaffolds the PinScope plugin + <PinScope/> into the target project.
claims.re_read: grep -c 'PINSCOPE INSTRUMENTATION' framework/commands/apex/ui-phase.md -> 1.

claims.claim: /apex:ui-review can ingest a PinScope Snapshot/Operation as review evidence.
claims.re_read: grep -c 'PINSCOPE EVIDENCE' framework/commands/apex/ui-review.md -> 1.

claims.claim: architect / frontend-specialist add pinscope to STATE.json.stack_skills for frontend projects.
claims.re_read: grep -l 'pinscope' framework/agents/architect.md framework/agents/specialist/frontend.md -> both files match.

claims.claim: apex-spec.md registers PinScope as a sanctioned extension/module.
claims.re_read: grep -l 'PinScope' apex-spec.md -> matches.

claims.claim: Round-trip end-state: average communication rounds per UI change < 2.
claims.re_read: Read SPEC §17.6; AC-107 (vitest-tag, tests/unit/roundtrip.test.ts) asserts one scripted scenario (examples/roundtrip/scenario.ts) resolves in <=2 rounds. The 'average < 2' aggregate metric is not measured.

candidate_acs.proposed_ac: AC-NEW-01 · P1 · P2 · build — the runtime ships with no Redux/Zustand dependency; state is React-hooks only (§4). **verify:** grep 'redux|zustand' over src/ and package.json dependencies returns 0.

AC-NEW-02 · P1 · P1 · build — PinScopeOptions resolves to the §6.1 default values when no options are passed (enabled, filePattern, excludePattern, pinMapPath, stripInProduction, excludeTags). **verify:** unit test calls resolveOptions({}) and asserts each default.

AC-NEW-03 · P1 · P1 · build — the Vite plugin's buildStart hook loads the PinMap and buildEnd reconciles + saves it. **verify:** unit test spies on PinMap.load/reconcile/save and invokes the plugin lifecycle hooks.
AC-NEW-04 · P1 · P2 · build — transformJSX parses with @babel/parser plugins jsx, typescript, and decorators-legacy. **verify:** unit fixture using a TS decorator transforms without a parse error.
AC-NEW-05 · P1 · P2 · build — a JSXOpeningElement with no source loc receives no data-pin. **verify:** unit test transforms a synthetic AST node lacking loc and asserts no attribute pushed.

AC-NEW-06 · P1 · P2 · build — PinMap.save() performs no disk write when nothing changed since load (dirty-gated). **verify:** unit test load()s, calls save() with no assigns, asserts fs.writeFileSync not called.

AC-NEW-07 · P1 · P1 · build — re-seeing a previously-deleted key in getOrAssign clears its deleted flag and refreshes last_seen. **verify:** unit test marks an entry deleted, calls getOrAssign with that key, asserts deleted absent and last_seen updated.

AC-NEW-08 · P1 · P1 · build — a moved element (changed line/column) yields a new e_N id, not the prior one. **verify:** unit test transforms a fixture, shifts the element's line, re-transforms, asserts a different id.

AC-NEW-09 · P2 · P1 · runtime — <PinScope/> mounts the full §7.1 HUD tree (PinBadges, Rulers, Crosshair, GridOverlay, InfoPanel, TopBar, CommandBar) inside [data-pinscope-ui=root]. **verify:** RTL test renders <PinScope/> and asserts a query handle for each of the 7 components.

AC-NEW-10 · P2 · P2 · runtime — <PinScope/> accepts and honours props hudPosition, defaultGridMode, and shortcutsEnabled. **verify:** RTL test passes each prop and asserts the corresponding behaviour.
AC-NEW-11 · P2 · P2 · runtime — when the HUD is hidden, <PinScope/> renders only a FloatingToggle. **verify:** RTL test hides the HUD and asserts only the FloatingToggle element is present.

AC-NEW-12 · P2 · P2 · runtime — useHoveredElement throttles mousemove through requestAnimationFrame, resolving the hovered element at most once per frame (§7.3). **verify:** unit test fires N rapid mousemove events within one frame and asserts a single hover resolution.
AC-NEW-13 · P1 · P2 · runtime — InfoPanel is rendered position:fixed at right:16px, top:56px, width:320px. **verify:** RTL/Playwright asserts the four computed style values.
AC-NEW-14 · P2 · P2 · runtime — CommandBar (40px) expands to 120px height while focused. **verify:** Playwright focuses the bar and asserts height transitions to 120px.
AC-NEW-15 · P3 · P2 · runtime — CommandBar Tab key triggers autocomplete for pins/properties/values. **verify:** RTL test types a partial pin, presses Tab, asserts the completed value.

AC-NEW-16 · P2 · P2 · runtime — StatePanel auto-generates override rules by scanning host stylesheets for :hover/:focus/:active. **verify:** unit test seeds a stylesheet with a :hover rule and asserts an override rule is generated.

AC-NEW-17 · P4 · P2 · runtime — snapshot creation persists through the dev-server endpoint /__pinscope/snapshot (flow D). **verify:** integration test triggers a snapshot and asserts a POST to /__pinscope/snapshot.

AC-NEW-18 · P2 · P1 · runtime — PinScope badge/overlay CSS rules carry !important so hostile host CSS cannot override them (§12 hostile CSS). **verify:** grep badges.css.ts asserts the z-index/background/positioning badge rules include !important.

AC-NEW-19 · P1 · P1 · integration — src/index.ts re-exports withPinScope (alongside pinscope, PinScope, useDevState and the public types) per §15. **verify:** runtime import test asserts `withPinScope` is exported from the package root entry, not only from the pinscope/next subpath.

strengthen_proposals.current_verify: Playwright reads ::before content for a sample of 5 pins (badge text == data-pin value).
strengthen_proposals.claim_quote: blue badge, red on hover, green when [data-pin-selected], z-index 2147483645-2147483647 (§7.2).
strengthen_proposals.proposed_verify: Playwright additionally asserts the badge ::before z-index is 2147483645 by default, and that background colour shifts to the red rgba on :hover and the green rgba on [data-pin-selected].

strengthen_proposals.current_verify: Playwright counts tick labels at 100px intervals for a 1440px viewport, monospace.
strengthen_proposals.claim_quote: ticks at 10/50/100/200 px, monospace labels, corner shows live mouse coords (§8.2).
strengthen_proposals.proposed_verify: Playwright asserts the multi-scale tick set (10/50/100/200 px) is rendered — including the 10/50 minor stripe scales — and that the ruler corner element displays the live mouse coordinates as the cursor moves.

strengthen_proposals.current_verify: Playwright moves the mouse, asserts crosshair line position, then asserts absence over the HUD.
strengthen_proposals.claim_quote: [Crosshair is] disabled over HUD, in measurement mode, or when HUD hidden (§8.3).
strengthen_proposals.proposed_verify: Playwright additionally asserts the crosshair is absent while measurement mode (M) is active and while the HUD is hidden, not only when the cursor is over the HUD.

strengthen_proposals.current_verify: Playwright clicks two fixtures, asserts the four numeric labels (Δx/Δy/diagonal/gap) match computed rects.
strengthen_proposals.claim_quote: smart alignment + on-scale hints; Alt-hover shows all sibling distances (§8.7).
strengthen_proposals.proposed_verify: In addition to the two-click measurement, assert that Alt-hovering an element renders distance labels to every sibling element. NOTE: the Alt-hover sibling-distance behaviour is currently UNIMPLEMENTED in MeasurementTool.tsx — adopting this strengthened verify would re-open AC-039 until the behaviour is built.

strengthen_proposals.current_verify: Integration test triggers a snapshot and validates the JSON against the §9.2 schema.
strengthen_proposals.proposed_verify: In addition to schema validation, assert each element's computed_styles object has exactly 32 keys, matching the §8.10 property count.

strengthen_proposals.current_verify: Integration test reads the clipboard and the history file after sending an operation.
strengthen_proposals.proposed_verify: Assert the CommandBar's own input history is persisted to .pinscope/history.json (via the /__pinscope/history dev-server route) and capped at the last 1000 entries, not only that ClaudeBridge appends a sent operation to a HistoryManager store.
